Who We Are

Built on Precision & Trust

AD-Deen Engineering is a specialist engineering firm based in Shah Alam, Selangor, dedicated to the servicing, maintenance, and repair of boilers and pressure equipment. With deep industry expertise and a commitment to safety, we ensure your critical systems operate at peak performance.

We serve a wide range of industries including manufacturing, food processing, palm oil, petrochemical, and hospitality sectors — delivering compliant, efficient, and reliable engineering solutions.

🛡️

Safety First

Strict adherence to DOSH and Factories Act regulations.

⚙️

Skilled Technicians

Experienced and certified engineers on every job.

⏱️

Fast Response

Emergency services available to minimise downtime.

📋

Full Documentation

Complete service reports and compliance certificates.

15+Years in
Engineering
What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive boiler and pressure equipment solutions — from routine maintenance to complex repairs.

01
🔥

Boiler Servicing & Maintenance

Scheduled maintenance and full servicing of fire-tube, water-tube, and steam boilers to ensure safe and efficient operation.

PreventiveScheduledSteam
02
🔧

Boiler Repair & Overhaul

Expert diagnosis and repair of boiler faults including tube leaks, refractory damage, burner malfunction, and control system failures.

RepairOverhaulEmergency
03
🛢️

Pressure Vessel Inspection

Internal and external inspection of pressure vessels in accordance with DOSH regulations and Malaysian Boiler & Pressure Vessel Act.

DOSHInspectionCompliance
04
🔩

Safety Valve & Fitting Services

Testing, calibration, and replacement of safety valves, pressure gauges, steam traps, and boiler fittings to maintain system integrity.

SafetyCalibrationValves
05
🔥

Burner & Combustion Services

Burner tuning, combustion analysis, efficiency optimisation, and replacement to reduce fuel consumption and emissions.

CombustionEfficiencyGas/Oil
06
📝

Regulatory Compliance & Certification

Assistance with DOSH registration, boiler certification renewal, risk assessment, and compliance with the Factories & Machinery Act.

DOSHCertificationRegulatory

How We Work

Our Process

Simple, transparent, and efficient — from first call to completion.

01

Initial Consultation

Contact us via phone or email. We assess your equipment needs and schedule a site visit.

02

Site Inspection

Our engineers conduct a thorough inspection and diagnostic assessment of your equipment.

03

Quotation & Planning

We provide a detailed quotation and service plan with transparent pricing.

04

Service & Certification

Work is carried out by certified technicians with full documentation and compliance certification issued.

Fire-Tube Boilers
